title: Tradeify Check website
description: Tradeify, based in the United States, was established in April 2024. The firm is a futures provider that offers 1 Step program types. Account sizes range from $10,000 to $150,000. Tradable instruments include Futures with 1:1 leverage for majors, exotics, and cryptocurrencies. Verified by our [Intelligence Hub](/) for prop trading excellence.
forbidden_strategies: Good Faith Policy: No exploiting price display/delays/technical errors.
Microscalping: 50%+ profit must come from trades > 10 seconds.

payout_policy.details: Growth: 90/10 split, 5 trading days min. Lightning: 90/10, no min days. Select Flex: 90/10, every 5 winning days. Tiered max payouts up to $25K (6th+).

firm_rules.copy_trading: Allowed with up to 5 accounts. Only personally owned accounts. Third-party copiers at own risk.
firm_rules.expert_advisor: Bots/algorithms allowed with ownership proof. No HFT bots.
firm_rules.news_trading: Allowed. NEVER use DLL as stop loss during volatility.
firm_rules.weekend_holding: All positions auto-closed at market close.

Microscalping: 50%+ profit must come from trades > 10 seconds.

seo_content:
Tradeify: US Futures Prop Firm Since 2024

Tradeify is a futures prop trading firm based in the United States, established in April 2024. Despite being one of the newer entrants in the futures prop space, Tradeify has attracted traders with a diverse lineup of evaluation and instant-funded programs: Growth (1-step), Select Daily and Select Flex (1-step with different payout structures), and Lightning Funded Plan (instant funded). All programs trade exclusively Futures instruments.

Account sizes range from $10,000 to $150,000 across evaluation programs; Instant accounts are available in $25,000, $50,000, and $100,000 sizes. Sample pricing: Lightning Instant 100K at $440.30 (standard $629), Lightning 50K at $328.30 (standard $469), Lightning 25K at $230.30 (standard $329), Growth 1-Step 150K at $251.30 (standard $359), Select Flex/Daily 150K at $215.40 (standard $359), Select 100K at $181.30 (standard $259), Select/Growth 50K from $97.30.

Four platforms are supported: Tradovate, TradingView, NinjaTrader, and Quantower. Tradable instruments are Futures only. A 20% consistency rule applies, meaning no single day can account for more than 20% of total profits. Microscalping rules require at least 50% of profits to come from trades lasting more than 10 seconds. Hedging is 100% prohibited. All positions auto-close at market close; weekend holding is not permitted.

Payout splits are 90/10 across all plans. Growth requires a minimum of 5 trading days and pays $500 to $1,500 minimum depending on account size. The Lightning plan has no minimum day requirement and a $1,000 minimum payout. Select Flex pays every 5 winning days with a $250 minimum. Processing time is 24-48 hours, or 72 hours outside business hours. Payout methods are Plane and Riseworks; payments via Credit Card, Crypto, and PayPal.

Tradeify is attractive to futures traders who want instant-funded options alongside evaluation accounts, with 90% payouts across all plans and a fast 24-48 hour processing window. Up to 5 own accounts may engage in copy trading; algorithmic bots are allowed with ownership proof but HFT bots are prohibited. Traders must execute at least 1 trade per week to keep accounts active. Max 15 evaluations per 30 days and max 5 funded accounts apply.
